title: Married to El Chapo: Emma Coronel Speaks
original_title: Married to El Chapo: Emma Coronel Speaks
overview: Swept off her feet by Mexico's most notorious drug lord at just seventeen, Emma Coronel, El Chapo's wife, reflects on her husband's crimes, their tumultuous marriage, and her time in prison, all while grappling with her own accountability.
